features: 【Christmas Elements Design】: The Xmas wrapping paper roll is designed with Xmas elements Santa's hat, bells, Christmas balls, pine branches, stars patterns, elegant and vintage wrapping paper will be perfect for gift wrapping.

【Quality Xmas Kraft Wrapping Paper】: The Christmas wrapping paper is made of high-quality kraft paper, thick and sturdy enough that will not tear or rip easily, Vintage Xmas kraft wrapping paper will easily create a strong festival atmosphere for Christmas.

【Large Roll Christmas Wrapping Paper】: The Christmas wrapping paper roll measures width 43CM by length 15M (17 Inch x 49 Feet - 69.4 sq.ft.ttl), providing you with enough wrapping paper material to wrap several small and medium gifts quickly and easily.
【Exquisite Packaging】: This Christmas wrapping paper roll with exquisite roll wrapping, no any creases when opened and easy storage, which makes your gifts more beautiful and perfect.

【All Occasions】: This Christmas wrapping paper roll is suitable for all ages, ideal gifts wrapping paper for both kids and adults, adorable wrapping paper roll is perfect for Christmas, New Year, Holidays, etc. It's also great for Christmas decorating, craft projects and bouquet wrapping.
description: Product Description Christmas wrapping paper roll, brown kraft wrapping paper, 17 inch x 49 feet - 69.4 sq.ft.ttl The wrapping paper christmas large rolls measures width 43CM by length 15M (17 Inch x 49 Feet - 69.4 sq.ft.ttl), enough wrap several small and medium gifts quickly and easily. The Xmas wrapping paper roll is printed with Christmas elements Santa's hat, bells, Christmas balls, pine branches, snowflake, stars patterns, which easily creates a strong festival atmosphere for Christmas. Quality kraft wrapping paper roll. Thick and sturdy, not tear or rip easily. Width 17 Inch x length 49 Feet = 69.4 sq.ft.ttl. Enough to wrap several small and medium gifts. Exquisite heat shrink film wrapping. No any creases and easy storage. Navy blue printed with Santa's hat, bells, Christmas balls, pine branches, snowflake, stars design gift wrapping paper for Xmas New Year winter holiday. The Christmas wrapping paper roll must make your gifts more beautiful and perfect. This Christmas wrapping paper roll is suitable for all occasions and all ages. Ideal gifts wrapping paper for both kids and adults. Adorable wrapping paper roll is perfect for Christmas, New Year, holidays, birthday, baby shower, wedding, graduations, etc. It's also great for Christmas decorating, craft projects and bouquet wrapping. MERRY CHRISTMAS AND HAPPY NEW YEAR !!!
